docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, STANLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, EDWARD $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-31-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, EDWARD
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR APR-05-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY YOUNG, EDWARD CHOW, STANLEY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT YOUNG, EDWARD TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT CHOW, STANLEY THE AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES, DESPITE ITS CHARACTERIZATION, COULD NOT BE PERFORMED WITHIN ONE YEAR AND IS INVALID UNDER CIVIL CODE 1624(A)(I). JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF APPELLANT, EDWARD YOUNG, AGAINST RESPONDENT, STANLEY CHOW; TOTAL JUDGMENT $0.00. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
REMARK: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON MAY 29, 2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2012 - JUDGMENT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: TRAVIS, ROBERT P SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR YOUNG, EDWARD
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-05-2012 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, STANLEY AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, EDWARD
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT YOUNG, EDWARD TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT CHOW, STANLEY THE AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES, DESPITE ITS CHARACTERIZATION, COULD NOT BE PERFORMED WITHIN ONE YEAR AND IS INVALID UNDER CIVIL CODE 1624(A)(1). THIS IS A ZERO JUDGMENT. RESPONDENT SHALL TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT OWE PLAINTIFF ANY MONEY ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OWE DEFENDANT ANY MONEY ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THIS IS A FINAL JUDGMENT AND CANNOT BE APPEALED. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG-01-2014

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:25 am
Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez - clerk, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Edward Young is present and represented by Robert Travis and also appearing is Michael Lee. Respondent, Stanley Chow is present and represented by Jeffrey Chen. Parties testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHA (1) Edward Young's small claims exhibits and request for judicial notice
EXHR (A) Various documents

12:32pm

Evidence is retained, matter is taken under submission.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Judgment Entered
